data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Adopts end-to-end encryption protocols to ensure that only authorized users can access their private messages and shared content.
data.technical_spec: Encryption libraries integrated into messaging services for maximum privacy.

data.title: Two-factor Authentication
data.description: Provides two-factor authentication to add an extra layer of security to user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Authentication via OTP, email, or authenticator apps, alongside passwords.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts routine security audits and bug bounty programs to identify and fix vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Comprehensive security checks involving internal and community-based ethical hacking.

data.title: Data Anonymization
data.description: Implements data anonymization practices to ensure user data privacy throughout data processing activities.
data.technical_spec: Anonymizing identifiable data points in analytics and storage systems.

data.title: Secure API Gateways
data.description: Ensures all API communications are authenticated and encrypted to prevent data breaches.
data.technical_spec: API gateways feature layered security controls, including tokens and encryption.
